steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage establishes that melanosomes are shaped differently depending on which colors they produce. The question asks what conclusion the researchers could draw about the fossil bird using that shape-color relationship.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: proposes finding melanosomes in other species — does not follow from the shape-color link. ✗
  • Choice B — determine the bird’s colors from melanosome appearance: directly applies the shape-color relationship discovered in the feather. ✓
  • Choice C: concerns explaining preservation — unrelated to the shape-color finding. ✗
  • Choice D: proposes identifying colors from fossils lacking melanosomes — contradicts the passage’s logic. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
